_meta.note: Community-Guides (NiaMeowDB Mai 2026 u.a.). Keine offiziellen Daten. Quelle pro Build verlinkt. | v24: feinkörnige prefs (Blitz/Feuer/Explosion/Normal/Physisch) pro Build.

inheritance.en: Ghost tree (best all-round). Late-PvP burst: Ranger tree.

heroes.pve_de: Knight of the End + Geisterprinzessin (Ghost Princess). Mythisch: April O'Neil als Ersatz.
heroes.pve_en: Knight of the End + Ghost Princess. Mythic: April O'Neil substitute.
heroes.pvp_de: Knight of the End + Geisterprinzessin (oder April O'Neil).
heroes.pvp_en: Knight of the End + Ghost Princess (or April O'Neil).

brands.pve_de: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra. Murloc (Kombo) früh, später SS Vulture. Boneclub Golem (Krit) leveln.
brands.pve_en: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra. Murloc (combo) early, later SS Vulture. Level Boneclub Golem (crit).
brands.pvp_de: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Frankenstein, Cleopatra.
brands.pvp_en: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Frankenstein, Cleopatra.

pets.pve_de: Ice Queen + Freya + Piggy. Früh: Unicorn + Slime King + Little Elephant.
pets.pve_en: Ice Queen + Freya + Piggy. Early: Unicorn + Slime King + Little Elephant.
pets.pvp_de: Ice Queen + Freya + Unicorn (Piggy raus – Kombo in PvP unsicher).

mounts.de: Diego (aktiv: Kombo +1/+20%), Laputa (PvE), Sphinx (Tower/PvP), Catastrophe (Tank). Diego NICHT erwecken.
mounts.en: Diego (active: combo +1/+20%), Laputa (PvE), Sphinx (Tower/PvP), Catastrophe (tank). Do NOT awaken Diego.

collection.de: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill-Krit). PvP zusätzlich Wave-Treading Dragon Boat.
collection.en: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill Crit). PvP also Wave-Treading Dragon Boat.

lines.en: Core idea

lines.de: Viele WAFFEN-Krits → pro Krit 2 Dolche. Dolche/Skills = Hauptschaden. Krit-Chance, Kombo, Skill-Schaden stapeln.
lines.en: Many WEAPON crits → 2 daggers per crit. Daggers/skills = main damage. Stack crit chance, combo and skill damage.
Equipment

lines.de: Waffe: Whisperer-Bogen (Pflicht). Elres nur mit Wut-Dolch-Gem/Sivira's Dagger.
lines.en: Weapon: Whisperer Bow (mandatory). Elres only with Rage-Dagger gem/Sivira's Dagger.

lines.de: Rüstung: Tunika (Schaden) oder Reinhardt's Resolve (Survival). Ring: Verdan/Judgment + Sivira's Dagger (immer 1 Wächterring!).
lines.en: Armor: Tunic (damage) or Reinhardt's Resolve (survival). Ring: Verdan/Judgment + Sivira's Dagger (always keep 1 Guardian's Ring!).
Accessory: Bloody Grail + Icy Bubble/Reckoning Badge.
Gems

lines.de: Waffe: Finaler Schaden > Wut-Dolch. Rüstung: Kombo-Anzahl +1 > FDR.
lines.en: Weapon: Final Damage > Rage Dagger. Armor: Combo Count +1 > FDR.

lines.de: Ring: Kombo-Rate > FDR-ignorieren. Halskette: ATK bei Treffer.
lines.en: Ring: Combo Rate > ignore-FDR. Accessory: ATK on hit.
Source/details: https://meowdb.com/db/capybara-go/whisperer-elres-ultimate-build-guide

inheritance.en: Ghost tree is the best all-round inheritance tree.

heroes.de: Allround stark: Knight of the End + Geisterprinzessin (Ghost Princess).
heroes.en: Strong all-round: Knight of the End + Ghost Princess.

brands.de: Top-Allround: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra.
brands.en: Top all-round: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra.

pets.de: Früh: Unicorn (Krit) + Slime King (Kombo/Konter) + Little Elephant (Survival). Später: Ice Queen + Freya.
pets.en: Early: Unicorn (crit) + Slime King (combo/counter) + Little Elephant (survival). Later: Ice Queen + Freya.

mounts.en: Diego (combo, active), Laputa (PvE damage), Sphinx (Tower/PvP), Catastrophe (tank).

collection.de: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill-Krit-Rate) ist der universelle Top-Pick.
collection.en: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill Crit Rate) is the universal top pick.

lines.en: Core idea

lines.de: Wut/Skill-Build: Basisangriffe erzeugen Wut. Ailoren ist stärker (Wut-Schaden ~800%) und in fast allem besser; Skysplitter ist die Starter-Waffe.
lines.en: Rage/skill build: basic attacks generate rage. Ailoren is stronger (~800% rage DMG) and better at almost everything; Skysplitter is the starter weapon.
Equipment

lines.de: Rüstung: Reinhardt's Resolve/Revival Cape (Sustain), Crimson Dracula (PvP), Tunika (Seal/Raid).
lines.en: Armor: Reinhardt's Resolve/Revival Cape (sustain), Crimson Dracula (PvP), Tunic (Seal/Raid).

lines.de: Ring: Verdan/Judgment (immer) + Skybreaker Elenos Creed. Drachenball nur mit Fantasy Joker.
lines.en: Ring: Verdan/Judgment (always) + Skybreaker Elenos Creed. Dragon Ball only with Fantasy Joker.

lines.de: Halskette: Ice Soul Guard (Survival) + Blutkelch / Reckoning Badge (Raid/Seal) / Justice Emblem (PvP-FDR).
lines.en: Accessory: Ice Soul Guard (survival) + Bloody Grail / Reckoning Badge (Raid/Seal) / Justice Emblem (PvP FDR).
Gems

lines.de: Waffe: Finaler Schaden > Globale ATK > Physisch > Schwertchi-Koeffizient.
lines.en: Weapon: Final Damage > Global ATK > Physical > Sword Chi Coefficient.

lines.de: Rüstung: Kombo-Anzahl +1 > FDR. Ring: Kombo-Rate > Globale ATK.
lines.en: Armor: Combo Count +1 > FDR. Ring: Combo Rate > Global ATK.
Accessory: Rage Skill Coefficient (rage skill!) > ATK on hit.
Source/details: https://meowdb.com/db/capybara-go/skysplitter-ailoren-ultimate-build-guide

builds.name: Helos / Blade of Justice  (Schwert · Einzelziel-DPS)

heroes.de: Allround stark: Knight of the End + Geisterprinzessin (Ghost Princess).
heroes.en: Strong all-round: Knight of the End + Ghost Princess.

brands.de: Top-Allround: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra.
brands.en: Top all-round: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra.

pets.de: Früh: Unicorn (Krit) + Slime King (Kombo/Konter) + Little Elephant (Survival). Später: Ice Queen + Freya.
pets.en: Early: Unicorn (crit) + Slime King (combo/counter) + Little Elephant (survival). Later: Ice Queen + Freya.

mounts.en: Diego (combo, active), Laputa (PvE damage), Sphinx (Tower/PvP), Catastrophe (tank).

collection.de: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill-Krit-Rate) ist der universelle Top-Pick.
collection.en: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill Crit Rate) is the universal top pick.

note.de: Einzelziel-DPS – braucht 5★ Raphael; schwach in AoE (Gulu/Hard Mode). Details: NiaMeowDB Helos/BoJ-Guide.
note.en: Single-target DPS – needs 5★ Raphael; weak in AoE (Gulu/Hard Mode). Details: NiaMeowDB Helos/BoJ guide.

lines.en: Core idea

lines.de: Stärkste EINZELZIEL-DPS-Waffe – aber kein AoE (schwach in Hard Mode/Gulu) und BRAUCHT 5★ Raphael. Kombo-/Basis-lastig, Wut nebensächlich. Helos Warblade > Blade of Justice (Starter).
lines.en: Strongest SINGLE-TARGET DPS – but no AoE (weak in Hard Mode/Gulu) and REQUIRES 5★ Raphael. Combo/basic focused, rage minor. Helos Warblade > Blade of Justice (starter).
Gems

lines.de: Kombo-Anzahl +1, Kombo-/Basis-Schaden-Boosts, Finaler Schaden. Survival: FDR / Immun gegen erste Schaden.
lines.en: Combo Count +1, combo/basic damage boosts, Final Damage. Survival: FDR / Immune to first damage.
Source/details: https://meowdb.com/db/capybara-go/helos-blade-of-justice-ultimate-build-guide

builds.name_en: Helos / Blade of Justice  (Sword · Single-target DPS)

builds.name: Angel Bow / St. Mung  (Bogen · PvP-Nuke/Tank)

inheritance.en: Ghost tree is the best all-round inheritance tree.

heroes.de: Allround stark: Knight of the End + Geisterprinzessin (Ghost Princess).
heroes.en: Strong all-round: Knight of the End + Ghost Princess.

brands.de: Top-Allround: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra.
brands.en: Top all-round: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra.

pets.de: Früh: Unicorn (Krit) + Slime King (Kombo/Konter) + Little Elephant (Survival). Später: Ice Queen + Freya.
pets.en: Early: Unicorn (crit) + Slime King (combo/counter) + Little Elephant (survival). Later: Ice Queen + Freya.

mounts.en: Diego (combo, active), Laputa (PvE damage), Sphinx (Tower/PvP), Catastrophe (tank).

collection.de: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill-Krit-Rate) ist der universelle Top-Pick.
collection.en: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill Crit Rate) is the universal top pick.

note.de: Dedizierte PvP-Waffe (Nuke ODER Tank) – schwächer in PvE. Details: NiaMeowDB St. Mung/Angel Bow-Guide.
note.en: Dedicated PvP weapon (nuke OR tank) – weaker in PvE. Details: NiaMeowDB St. Mung/Angel Bow guide.

lines.en: Core idea

lines.de: Dedizierte PvP-Waffe: zwei Nuke-Fenster, hoher Passiv-Schaden während Stun. Ilar-Engel (vom Wut-Skill) wandelt Schaden in Schild → als Nuke ODER Tank spielbar. Deutlich schwächer in PvE. Angel Bow (S) → St. Mung's Elven Bow (SS).
lines.en: Dedicated PvP weapon: two nuke windows, heavy passive damage while stunned. Ilar Angel converts damage into shield → playable as nuke OR tank. Much weaker in PvE. Angel Bow (S) → St. Mung's Elven Bow (SS).
Gems

lines.de: Finaler Schaden; Survival via FDR + Krit-Schadensreduktion (Tank) bzw. Krit/Globale ATK (Nuke).
lines.en: Final Damage; survival via FDR + Crit DR (tank) or crit/Global ATK (nuke).
Source/details: https://meowdb.com/db/capybara-go/mung-elven-bow-ultimate-build-guide

inheritance.en: Ghost tree is the best all-round inheritance tree.

heroes.en: Strong all-round: Knight of the End + Ghost Princess.

brands.de: Top-Allround: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra.
brands.en: Top all-round: Fantasy Joker, White Robe Wizard, Cleopatra.

pets.de: Früh: Unicorn (Krit) + Slime King (Kombo/Konter) + Little Elephant (Survival). Später: Ice Queen + Freya.
pets.en: Early: Unicorn (crit) + Slime King (combo/counter) + Little Elephant (survival). Later: Ice Queen + Freya.

mounts.en: Diego (combo, active), Laputa (PvE damage), Sphinx (Tower/PvP), Catastrophe (tank).

collection.de: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill-Krit-Rate) ist der universelle Top-Pick.
collection.en: 1st Anniversary Cake (Skill Crit Rate) is the universal top pick.

note.de: Blitz-Stab; Wut-Koeffizient NUTZLOS (Wut macht 0 Wutschaden). PvE + PvP-Tank/Nuke. Details: NiaMeowDB Nashir/Reaper-Guide.
note.en: Lightning staff; rage coefficient USELESS (rage deals 0 rage damage). PvE + PvP tank/nuke. Details: NiaMeowDB Nashir/Reaper guide.

lines.en: Core idea

lines.de: Blitz-Stab: Schaden kommt fast nur aus Wut-/Auflade-DONNERN, nicht aus Wut-Skalierung. WICHTIG: Wut macht 0 Wutschaden – Wut-Koeffizient & Wut-Schaden sind NUTZLOS. Stattdessen Daji-Koeffizient + Blitz stapeln. Reaper Staff (S) → Divine Thunder Nashir's Scepter (SS).
lines.en: Lightning staff: damage from rage/charge-release THUNDERS, not rage scaling. IMPORTANT: rage deals 0 rage damage – rage coefficient & rage damage are USELESS. Stack Daji coefficient + lightning instead. Reaper Staff (S) → Divine Thunder Nashir's Scepter (SS).
Gems

lines.de: Finaler Schaden + Blitz-/Schaden-Quellen. KEIN Wut-Koeffizient. Survival: FDR.
lines.en: Final Damage + lightning/damage sources. NO rage coefficient. Survival: FDR.
Source/details: https://meowdb.com/db/capybara-go/reaper-nashir-ultimate-build-guide

note.de: PvP Anti-Schild (gegen Nashir/Mung/Dracula); Krit-DR-Fokus. Nicht für PvE. Details: NiaMeowDB Seles Suffering/Durian-Guide.
note.en: PvP anti-shield (vs Nashir/Mung/Dracula); crit-DR focus. Not for PvE. Details: NiaMeowDB Seles Suffering/Durian guide.

lines.en: Core idea

lines.de: PvP-Waffe (Seles Suffering, Übergang über Durian Hammer): Anti-Schild-Spezialist gegen Nashir/Mung/Dracula-Stacks. Setzt auf Krit-Schadensreduktion. Nicht für PvE.
lines.en: PvP weapon (Seles Suffering, via Durian Hammer transition): anti-shield specialist vs Nashir/Mung/Dracula stacks. Relies on Crit DR. Not for PvE.
Gems

lines.de: Schaden an Schild-Zielen, Konterrate, Immun gegen Kontrolle, FDR, Krit-Schadensreduktion.
lines.en: Damage to shielded targets, Counter Rate, immune to control, FDR, Crit DR.
Source/details: https://meowdb.com/db/capybara-go/durian-seles-suffering-ultimate-build-guide

lines.en: Staff build with PvE and PvP setups. Exact build details (gems/heroes/brands/pets): NiaMeowDB Star Staff guide.

lines.en: General: Final Damage + coefficients, survival via FDR.

note.de: PvP-only Konter/Tank – nicht für PvE. Details: NiaMeowDB Mushroom-Hammer-Guide.
note.en: PvP-only counter/tank – not for PvE. Details: NiaMeowDB Mushroom Hammer guide.

lines.en: Core idea

lines.de: PvP-only Konter/Tank: −25% Schaden nach Konter, +25% HP, Schild. NICHT für PvE.
lines.en: PvP-only counter/tank: −25% DMG after counter, +25% HP, shield. NOT for PvE.
Equipment

lines.de: Rüstung: Crimson Dracula Chestplate. Ring: Forbidden Julian Inquisition (fix) + Thunderous Ezra End (wenig DR) ODER Verdan-Ring (genug DR).
lines.en: Armor: Crimson Dracula Chestplate. Ring: Forbidden Julian Inquisition (locked) + Thunderous Ezra End (low DR) OR Verdan Ring (ample DR).

lines.de: Halskette: Ice Soul Guard + Battle Will Grande Wrath (später Reckoning Badge mit Cursed Blade Muramasa A7/A10).
lines.en: Accessory: Ice Soul Guard + Battle Will Grande Wrath (later Reckoning Badge with Cursed Blade Muramasa A7/A10).
Adventurer / Gems

lines.de: Abenteurer: Wukong. Synergie: Endless Battle, War Maniac, Mind Focus.
lines.en: Adventurer: Wukong. Synergy: Endless Battle, War Maniac, Mind Focus.

lines.de: Edelsteine: Konterrate, FDR, Immun gegen Kontrolle, Schadensreduktion, Silence.
lines.en: Gems: Counter Rate, FDR, immune to control, damage reduction, silence.
Source/details: https://meowdb.com/db/capybara-go/mushroom-hammer-build-guide

lines.en: Cap rules

lines.de: Krit-Schaden-Cap: 500% (700% mit speziellem Ring) – nicht überstacken.
lines.en: Crit DMG cap: 500% (700% with a specific ring).
1000% cap: coefficients (rage/dagger/combo/sword chi) bypass it; '% damage' counts toward it.

lines.de: Immer mind. 1 Wächterring behalten. Defensiv-Steine im PvE nur, solange du stirbst.
lines.en: Always keep ≥1 Guardian's Ring. Defensive gems in PvE only while you die.
Analysis tip

lines.de: Scanne jeden Slot im Scanner-Tab; der Loadout-Tab zeigt dein ganzes Build + Empfehlungen.
lines.en: Scan each slot in the Scanner tab; the Loadout tab shows your full build + recommendations.
